name: Octodamus Market Intelligence
description: Agentic market intelligence oracle for AI agents. Compatible with Robinhood agentic trading. 27 live data feeds: RISK-ON/OFF/NEUTRAL macro regime, stock signals (congressional + macro + price), BUY/SELL/HOLD for BTC/ETH/SOL, Polymarket edges with EV. Ed25519-signed. x402 native on Base.
